'''kadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xerophytically|xerophytically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xerophytically|xerophytically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kadate|kadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kadatesher|kadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadatesherĂ«m|kadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kadatero|kadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kadateshĂ«|kadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadateshĂ«m|kadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikadatero|gokikadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikadateshĂ«|gokikadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadateshĂ«m|gokikadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokadankerom|gokadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokadankeshĂ«|gokadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadankeshĂ«m|gokadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokadankeya|gokadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kadaterom|kadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadatemu|kadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kadateya|kadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikadaterom|gokikadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadatemu|gokikadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikadateya|gokikadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kadadate|kadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kadadatesher|kadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadadatesherĂ«m|kadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kadadatero|kadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kadadateshĂ«|kadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadadateshĂ«m|kadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikadadatero|gokikadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikadadateshĂ«|gokikadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadadateshĂ«m|gokikadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokadadankerom|gokadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokadadankeshĂ«|gokadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadadankeshĂ«m|gokadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokadadankeya|gokadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kadadaterom|kadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadadatemu|kadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kadadateya|kadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikadadaterom|gokikadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadadatemu|gokikadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikadadateya|gokikadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠdĂŠte|kĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠdĂŠtesher|kĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠdĂŠtero|kĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠdĂŠtero|gokikĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠdĂŠterom|kĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠdĂŠtemu|kĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠdĂŠteya|kĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠdĂŠterom|gokikĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠdĂŠteya|gokikĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafdafte|kafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafdaftesher|kafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafdaftesherĂ«m|kafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafdaftero|kafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafdafteshĂ«|kafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafdafteshĂ«m|kafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafdaftero|gokikafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafdafteshĂ«|gokikafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafdafteshĂ«m|gokikafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafdafnkerom|gokafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafdafnkeshĂ«|gokafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafdafnkeshĂ«m|gokafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafdafnkeya|gokafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafdafterom|kafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafdaftemu|kafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafdafteya|kafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafdafterom|gokikafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafdaftemu|gokikafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafdafteya|gokikafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
